Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-21620 affecting package erlang for versions less than 26.2.5.17-1
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-21620 affecting package erlang for versions less than 26.2.5.17-1. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package erlang is earlier than 26.2.5.17-1, affected by CVE-2026-21620
